featureTitle: Phase 15: Enterprise Hardening (Security + HIPAA Posture + Reliability + Observability)
highlights: HIPAA-posture audit logging wired into all 12 clinical endpoints
Zod request validation on all POST bodies
Security headers (nosniff, DENY, HSTS, no-store) + rate limiting
Session hardening (configurable TTLs + idle timeout + rotation)
ws-console and write-backs migrated to centralized audit
